ddls:
CREATE TABLE "documents" (
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "doc_title" TEXT /* Title of the document */,
  "doc_type" TEXT /* Type of the document (e.g., HTML, XML) */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the document was uploaded */,
  "owner_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the document */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the document */,
  "doc_status" TEXT /* Status of the document (e.g., draft, published, archived) */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Last modification date of the document */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Indicates if the document is publicly accessible */,
  "metadata" TEXT /* Additional metadata about the document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doc_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the CMS (e.g., admin, editor) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date the user last logged in */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "style_ownership" (
  "ownership_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the ownership record */,
  "stylesheet_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stylesheet being owned */,
  "owner_type" TEXT /* Type of owner (e.g., document, user) */,
  "owner_reference" INTEGER /* ID of the owner (either document ID or user ID) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the ownership was assigned */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Last modification date of the ownership record */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the ownership is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ownership_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "import_rules" (
  "import_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each import rule */,
  "stylesheet_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stylesheet that imports another */,
  "imported_stylesheet_link" TEXT /* Link to the imported stylesheet file */,
  "import_order" INTEGER /* Order of the import rule */,
  "is_critical" INTEGER /* Indicates if the import rule is critical for the stylesheet */,
  "import_type" TEXT /* Type of import (e.g., @import, <link>) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("import_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "processing_instructions" (
  "instruction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each processing instruction */,
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the document associated with this instruction */,
  "instruction" TEXT /* Content of the processing instruction */,
  "instruction_type" TEXT /* Type of processing instruction (e.g., xml-stylesheet) */,
  "is_critical" INTEGER /* Indicates if the processing instruction is critical for the document's rendering */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the processing instruction was added */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instruction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_processing_instructions_doc_id FOREIGN KEY ("doc_id") REFERENCES documents ("doc_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the document */,
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the document was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the document */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client accessing the document */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "is_successful" INTEGER /* Indicates if the access was successful */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_doc_id FOREIGN KEY ("doc_id") REFERENCES documents ("doc_id")
)
